3324830.name: Christmas Fables: The Wishing Store Collector's Edition Demo
3324830.description: Embark on a journey to help a bleak town find its festive cheer and mend broken connections! Welcome to Christmasshire, where the spirit of the season has been banished by Mr. Greedy, a mayor with a heart of ice. To prove to your father that you're worthy of inheriting his toy empire, explore this joyless town, unravel its secrets, and revive the festive spirit. Join forces with the toy master Nicholas and Rudolf the reindeer to remind everyone what makes this season special! Will you be able to remind the town what makes this season magical?
3324830.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语, 德语, 俄语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
